Welcome

Breathe Deeper.
Recover Faster.
Live Better.

At Peace of Mind Rehab Center, we bring premium hyperbaric oxygen therapy to everyone in Miami. Our OxyRevo Heal 40 soft-shell chamber delivers 1.4 ATA pressurized oxygen — used by elite athletes and wellness leaders — in a comfortable, accessible setting. Join the club and your first session is on us.

Discover the Benefits
How It Works

Simple. Powerful.
Accessible.

1. Book — Reserve your session online or by phone in under 60 seconds.
2. Relax — Enter the OxyRevo Heal 40 chamber. Read, meditate, or rest.
3. Feel — Notice improved energy, less soreness, better sleep after session one.
4. Commit — Join a membership and get your first session free.

Your Body on Oxygen

The Benefits of
Hyperbaric Therapy

Energy & Vitality

Flood your cells with oxygen to fight fatigue and feel energized from the inside out.

Faster Recovery

Reduce muscle soreness and bounce back faster from physical stress and workouts.

Reduce Inflammation

Oxygen-rich blood naturally combats chronic inflammation at the cellular level.

Mental Clarity

Improved brain oxygenation enhances focus, mood, and cognitive performance.

Better Sleep

Clients consistently report deeper, more restorative sleep after regular sessions.

Anti-Aging

Promote cellular regeneration for healthier skin, longevity, and overall vitality.

Why Hyperbaric Therapy Works

Real Stories.
Real Recovery.

Brain Recovery

NFL Legend Reversed His Brain Damage

After multiple concussions during his NFL career, brain scans revealed traumatic injury with almost no blood flow to the left side of his brain. After 120 hyperbaric sessions, his cognitive tests and brain scans showed significant improvement. He founded the Joe Namath Neurological Research Center at Jupiter Medical Center in Florida.

Joe Namath · NFL Hall of Fame QB
Peak Performance

LeBron James Installed a Chamber in His Home

NBA legend LeBron James has a hyperbaric chamber installed in his home and uses it regularly as part of his recovery and performance routine. At 40+ years old, he credits advanced recovery methods including hyperbaric therapy for his ability to compete at the highest level season after season.

LeBron James · NBA Legend
Impossible Comeback

Back on the Field 7 Weeks After Surgery

Terrell Owens fractured his fibula and tore a ligament in his ankle. Doctors said he was done for the season. He used a hyperbaric chamber at home as part of his recovery, and seven weeks later played in the Super Bowl — catching 9 passes for 122 yards. ESPN called it one of the most courageous performances in Super Bowl history.

Terrell Owens · NFL Wide Receiver
"La mejor decisión de bienestar que he tomado. Peace of Mind realmente hace honor a su nombre."
— Felix A. · Reseña Verificada de Google
